name: reprosight
description: Evidence-driven AI visual repair for frontend defects

scripts.build: npm run build -w @reprosight/core && npm run build -w reprosight && npm run build -w @reprosight/benchmark && npm run build -w @reprosight/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @reprosight/core && npm run typecheck -w reprosight && npm run typecheck -w @reprosight/benchmark && npm run typecheck -w @reprosight/dashboard && npm run typecheck -w @reprosight/core
scripts.test: npm run test -w @reprosight/core && npm run test -w reprosight && npm run test -w @reprosight/benchmark
